summary: Tested BidBlitz Pay Portfolio/Wallet translations for Albanian (Shqip) and German. Most translations are working correctly. Found one issue: SecuritySettings component has hardcoded German text instead of using t() function.

issues: SecuritySettings component in BiometricAuth.js has hardcoded German text instead of using t() translation function

action_items: Update BiometricAuth.js SecuritySettings component to accept language/t() function as prop and use translations instead of hardcoded German text
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ BidBlitzPay.jsx has 0 occurrences of 'language === de' pattern - VERIFIED via grep
✓ German translations in walletTranslations.js include all new keys (noContactsSaved, manualEntry, cameraReady, biometricAuth, etc.) - VERIFIED
✓ Albanian translations in walletTranslations.js (sq section) include all new keys - VERIFIED
✓ Albanian UI shows correct translations: 'Bilanci i disponueshëm', 'Kontaktet e ruajtura', 'Shto', 'Dërgo para', 'Hyrje manuale', 'Bëj foto', 'Rekomanduar' - VERIFIED via Playwright
✓ German UI shows correct translations: 'Gespeicherte Kontakte', 'Manuelle Eingabe', 'Biometrische Authentifizierung' - VERIFIED via Playwright
✗ BiometricAuth.js SecuritySettings component has hardcoded German text - NOT using t() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: BidBlitz Pay translations for Albanian and German are working correctly in most areas. The SecuritySettings component in BiometricAuth.js needs to be updated to use the t() translation function instead of hardcoded German text. All other wallet/portfolio translations are working as expected.

german.noContactsSaved: Noch keine Kontakte gespeichert - VERIFIED in walletTranslations.js
german.biometricAuth: Biometrische Authentifizierung - VERIFIED in UI (but hardcoded in BiometricAuth.js)

albanian.noContactsSaved: Ende nuk ka kontakte të ruajtura - VERIFIED in walletTranslations.js
albanian.biometricAuth: Autentifikimi biometrik - VERIFIED in walletTranslations.js (but not used in BiometricAuth.js)
